name: Gibson Assembly

components.name: 1. 设计引物 (15-25 bp 重叠区)
3. 冰上配制反应: Master Mix + DNA 片段

notes.en: Seamless, scarless DNA assembly. Joins 2-6 fragments with 15-25 bp overlaps in a single isothermal reaction. No restriction enzymes or ligase needed separately — T5 exonuclease, Phusion polymerase, and Taq ligase work together in one tube.
notes.zh: 无缝无疤 DNA 组装。通过 15-25 bp 重叠区在单一等温反应中连接 2-6 个片段。无需单独使用限制酶或连接酶——T5 外切酶、Phusion 聚合酶和 Taq 连接酶在同一管中协同工作。

ref: Gibson et al. (2009) Nat Methods 6:343–345; NEB Protocol E5510 (protocols.io doi:10.17504/protocols.io.bdddi226)
